title: Yara's Colorful Treats
synopsis: Baby Yara explores different colored foods with delightful sounds and reactions, from red apples that crunch to purple grapes that pop, creating a joyful sensory experience that introduces colors and foods through repetitive, soothing language.

illustration.description: Baby Yara with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits in a yellow high chair, holding a bright red apple. Her dark eyes sparkle with delight as she takes a bite. The background is soft cream with gentle red watercolor splashes around the edges.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara eating a red apple in her high chair

illustration.description: Yara squeezes orange slices between her tiny fingers, orange juice dripping down. Her face shows pure joy with a big toothless smile. Soft orange watercolor washes fill the background, and her bib has cheerful fruit patterns.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara squishing orange slices with her hands

illustration.description: Yara holds a ripe yellow banana, taking enthusiastic bites. Her cheeks are full and round, with banana smeared on her chin. The background features gentle yellow swirls and her diverse family members smile warmly in the soft-focus background.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara eating a yellow banana messily

illustration.description: Yara nibbles on bright green broccoli florets, her expression curious and focused. Her grandmother with silver hair and kind brown eyes sits beside her, encouraging her. Soft green watercolor leaves frame the scene with warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara trying green broccoli with grandmother nearby

illustration.description: Yara holds a cup filled with blue smoothie made from blueberries, purple liquid around her mouth. Her father with dark skin and a gentle smile helps steady the cup. The background has soft blue watercolor clouds and floating blueberries.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara drinking blue smoothie with her father's help

illustration.description: Yara places purple grapes one by one into her mouth, her cheeks puffed out. Her mother with long black hair braided with colorful beads watches lovingly. Gentle purple watercolor grapes dance around the frame with sparkly highlights.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara eating purple grapes while mother watches

illustration.description: Yara licks a pink strawberry, juice running down her chin. Her older brother with similar features helps clean her face with a soft cloth. The background features delicate pink watercolor flowers and heart shapes floating gently.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara licking a pink strawberry with brother helping

illustration.description: Yara drinks creamy white milk from her bottle, held securely in her chubby hands. Her eyes are content and sleepy. The background is soft white with gentle pearl-like bubbles floating around, creating a peaceful, dreamy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Baby Yara drinking white milk from her bottle contentedly

pages.text: Yara sees all colors! Yum, yum!

illustration.description: Yara claps her hands happily, surrounded by all the colorful foods from previous pages arranged in a rainbow pattern. Her whole diverse family gathers around her high chair, all smiling and celebrating. The background explodes with gentle watercolor rainbow swirls.
illustration.alt: Happy Yara surrounded by rainbow of colorful foods and family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does Yara make when eating the red apple?
questions.explanation: Yara makes 'crunch, crunch!' sounds when eating the red apple.

questions.question: What color are the grapes that go 'pop, pop'?
questions.explanation: The grapes that make 'pop, pop' sounds are purple.

questions.question: Who helps Yara with the blue smoothie?
questions.explanation: Yara's father helps her with the blue smoothie.
